examples: Glyph of Bestial Wrath: Decreases the cooldown of Bestial Wrath by 20 SEC.
To insult someone we call him "bestial." For deliberate cruelty and nature, "human" might be the greater insult.
It is an uncontrollable mystery "on the bestial floor" : on the floor, on the bottom, on the ground, where the animals dwell.
Bangladesh slumped to 40-4 next over when Harmison struck, cramping Rajin Saleh with a bestial riser that was gloved high to the keeper.
